sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: So, have you been listening to anything interesting lately?
Yeah, I've been really into this indie rock band called "The National" recently.
Oh, cool! I used to listen to them a lot back in high school.
Really? What's your favorite song by them?
Hmm, probably "Fake Empire." It's such an emotional song and always gives me goosebumps.
That's a great choice! I love that song too. Have you listened to any new artists or genres lately that you've enjoyed?
Actually, yes! Recently, I discovered this electronic music artist named Tycho and his music has been playing on repeat for me.
Nice! I haven't heard of him before but I'll definitely give his music a try.
Definitely check him out, I think you might like it. Do you have any favorite artists or songs that you want to share?
Sure, I really enjoy the rapper J. Cole and his album "KOD" was amazing.
I've heard good things about J. Cole, I should check him out sometime.
For sure, let me know what you think if you do end up checking him out.
Will do, thanks for sharing your recommendation!
No problem, happy to share my favorites. Any other genres or artists you like?
Besides indie rock and electronic music, I also really enjoy hip hop and R&B, especially from artists like Kendrick Lamar, Frank Ocean, and SZA.
Those are all awesome choices! Kendrick Lamar's album "good kid, m.
Yeah, "good kid, m .a.d city" is one of my all-time favorite albums.
Agreed, it's so well done. What's your favorite track off that album?
Hm, tough decision, but I'd say either "Backseat Freestyle" or "Poetic Justice".
Both great picks! I personally love "Swimming Pools (Drank)" from that same album.
Ah, yeah, that's a great song too. We seem to have similar taste in music!
Awesome, I'm glad we found some common ground in music. Thanks for chatting with me!
Of course, thank you for chatting with me too! It was nice talking with you.

Same here, take care! Bye! *click*
